tweetText: Sam Altman addressed concerns raised by a New Yorker article questioning his trustworthiness, following an attack on his home. This is significant as it highlights ongoing scrutiny of leaders in the AI space. via TechCrunch AI

The internet is overwhelming our ability to spot fake information, thanks to AI-generated images and limited data access. This matters because it undermines trust and complicates our understanding of reality. via WIRED AI

The New Yorker used AI-generated art for its profile of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, featuring a surreal and unsettling illustration. This raises concerns about the future of human artists in a world increasingly reliant on AI for creative work. via The Verge AI

An AI plushie named Coral informed a user about fan theories suggesting Mitski’s dad was a CIA operative. This highlights the quirky and unexpected ways AI can engage with culture and conversation. via The Verge AI

While the White House focused on lighthearted memes, Iran's state media showcased the harsh realities of war with graphic footage from the ground. This stark contrast highlights the power of narrative in shaping public perception. via The Verge AI.
